description: Style NoteGet ready to explore your surroundings in comfort and style in these Trek floaters from puma. Team them with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.Product DetailsGrey and white floaters with synthetic straps over the forefoot, front and back of the ankle with adjustable velcro strapsDecorative stitched detailing for eye appealBrand logo on the forefoot, ankle and back strapsSoft footbed with ergonomic design, non-slip grooves and heel counter for all-day comfortTPR outsole with multi- directional lugs for superior grip and durabilityMaterial and CareSyntheticRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash
